name: Autrey, Newman
description: "Sir" has forged ahead in Science and is one of our leading graduates.
text: "Sir" has forged ahead in Science and is one of our leading graduates.

name: Lyons, Joe
description: Joe is a friend to all and by his personality and conduct, should hang out his shingle at any place.
text: Joe is a friend to all and by his personality and conduct, should hang out his shingle at any place.

name: Agricola
clubs: Assistant Business Manager of Tuba Agricola
Vice President of the Senior Class
quartet and Business Manager of the Agricola '23 and '25
description: He has endeared himself with A. P. C. students. He is a booster who boosts and fighting is his mode of rest.
text: He has endeared himself with A. P. C. students. He is a booster who boosts and fighting is his mode of rest.

name: Bennett, Joe J.
description: So with Joe, he is a pioneer in that he seeks to blaze a way in whatever he does. Dan Cupid has pierced his armor.
text: So with Joe, he is a pioneer in that he seeks to blaze a way in whatever he does. Dan Cupid has pierced his armor.

name: Denton, Powers
description: "Spatch" is the proud possessor of a handsome face and a versatile mind. And no mean rival for the hand of fair lady. If success comes to the persistent, surely then success will be his.
text: "Spatch" is the proud possessor of a handsome face and a versatile mind. And no mean rival for the hand of fair lady. If success comes to the persistent, surely then success will be his.

name: James, A. Myover
clubs: End. First President of Periclean Society
description: "Jimmy" has a knowledge of Agriculture rivaled by his knowledge for travel, gained by 10,000 miles in tours by a side-door pullman. However, he never fails to back his conviction with plenty of argument.
text: "Jimmy" has a knowledge of Agriculture rivaled by his knowledge for travel, gained by 10,000 miles in tours by a side-door pullman. However, he never fails to back his conviction with plenty of argument.

name: McIlroy, Oral H.
motto: "Mac has by his untiring efforts made our annual this year what it is and has succeeded in making it the best Agricola we have placed in print. He is a booster who boosts, and a helper who helps."
text: "Mac has by his untiring efforts made our annual this year what it is and has succeeded in making it the best Agricola we have placed in print. He is a booster who boosts, and a helper who helps."

name: Rose, Dennis
description: The one who said "Give me the versatile man" must have been thinking of Dennis. He represents real ability and can do hosts of things. He always strives for the best, although veering occasionally from the Academic side to a humanistic one. Hope you win 'er!
text: The one who said "Give me the versatile man" must have been thinking of Dennis. He represents real ability and can do hosts of things. He always strives for the best, although veering occasionally from the Academic side to a humanistic one. Hope you win 'er!

name: Walker, Johnnie
description: He says very little, rather makes himself heard by his action. He's apt, efficient and gentlemanly.
text: He says very little, rather makes himself heard by his action. He's apt, efficient and gentlemanly.

name: Bewley, Arch
description: Arch, may your good nature continue to make friends for you.
text: Arch, may your good nature continue to make friends for you.

name: Tucker, John
clubs: Assistant Advertising Manager of the Agricola '25
description: He is versatile, not only in literary and social life, but also in the athletic and structural domain. John, by his unselfish attitude, has made a host of friends in
text: He is versatile, not only in literary and social life, but also in the athletic and structural domain. John, by his unselfish attitude, has made a host of friends in

name: Carroll, Jones
motto: "Cap is one of the best; he's athletic, industrious, studious, and willing to do. He is capable of doing, willing and a leader. The class expects him to be one of our best graduates."
description: AGRICOLA
text:
"Cap is one of the best; he's athletic, industrious, studious, and willing to do. He is capable of doing, willing and a leader. The class expects him to be one of our best graduates."
AGRICOLA

name: Monta, Nixon
description: Monta's a real baseball pitcher, a "golf bug" and a first-rate student.
text: Monta's a real baseball pitcher, a "golf bug" and a first-rate student.

name: Howard, Burton
clubs: Sergt. Arkansas National Guard, Battery F '25
description: Howard's a two-class man, a good mixer and a gallant courtier.
text: Howard's a two-class man, a good mixer and a gallant courtier.

name: G. E., Tanner
description: As postmaster Tanner sees us all every day. He either disappoints us by saying "Nothing today" or causes us to feel like rejoicing by handing us a letter or package.
text: As postmaster Tanner sees us all every day. He either disappoints us by saying "Nothing today" or causes us to feel like rejoicing by handing us a letter or package.

name: Sadler, J. Overton
description: Overton does not create much of a stir but he has a way of accomplishing things.
text: Overton does not create much of a stir but he has a way of accomplishing things.

name: Clark, Otha
description: Otha's favorite haunt between twelve fifteen and one o'clock is the main building.
text: Otha's favorite haunt between twelve fifteen and one o'clock is the main building.

name: Jones, Count
description: Count is one of our best. He's studious, quiet, manly and by his good demeanor has made a host of friends at A. P. C.
text: Count is one of our best. He's studious, quiet, manly and by his good demeanor has made a host of friends at A. P. C.

name: Longstreth, Alvin
description: The use of dynamite rolled down from Bishop street, years ago and was exploded at the Arkansas Polytechnic College.
text: The use of dynamite rolled down from Bishop street, years ago and was exploded at the Arkansas Polytechnic College.

name: Overbey, Varnell
motto: However hopelessly in love, we believe in time she will be a leading lady of the state.
text: However hopelessly in love, we believe in time she will be a leading lady of the state.

name: Hester, Lynn
description: Lynn is making for the school another good student and basketball player.
text: Lynn is making for the school another good student and basketball player.

name: Ward, Junius
description: Junius has a passion for fat women. He has found three between six and eleven to slip into society a little.
text: Junius has a passion for fat women. He has found three between six and eleven to slip into society a little.

name: Overby, Harold
motto: "Oh! where, oh where can we find one just like him. There are none."
text: "Oh! where, oh where can we find one just like him. There are none."

name: Deshazo, Oris
description: Beware of the man who never talks and a dog that never barks.
text: Beware of the man who never talks and a dog that never barks.

name: Alcie Oldham
description: Her generous soul is a sunshine to every mind.
text: Her generous soul is a sunshine to every mind.

name: J. T. Hodges
description: J. T. is out of luck with English. He tried it through the center, round the ends, forward passes but still was four downs and goal to go. Finally a special cramming formation got him by.
text: J. T. is out of luck with English. He tried it through the center, round the ends, forward passes but still was four downs and goal to go. Finally a special cramming formation got him by.

name: Clyde Magness
description: "Ki-otic" takes his own good way, breathes through his nose and says nothing. He has made an enviable record and has never found time for athletics or girls.
text: "Ki-otic" takes his own good way, breathes through his nose and says nothing. He has made an enviable record and has never found time for athletics or girls.

name: Pauline Edwards
description: We are compelled to say when we see Charity, "Dignity, Dignity, where art thou?"
text: We are compelled to say when we see Charity, "Dignity, Dignity, where art thou?"

name: Dudley Edwards
description: Dudley is handsome and a brother of Pauline.
text: Dudley is handsome and a brother of Pauline.

name: Agricola, Florence Dean
description: Gentle in mind, firm in reality.
text: Gentle in mind, firm in reality.

name: Smith, Chas. B.
motto: "Oh! that I had a title good enough for that little girl. C. B. has made a worthy leader for once and for all, a booster for his school."
text: "Oh! that I had a title good enough for that little girl. C. B. has made a worthy leader for once and for all, a booster for his school."

name: Moore, Jerrell
description: Sleepy is an admirable example of the sobriety and loyalty that is supposed to adhere to a senior.
text: Sleepy is an admirable example of the sobriety and loyalty that is supposed to adhere to a senior.

name: Mccullough, Faye
clubs: Pres. of Y. W. C. A. '23, '24
description: During her stay at Aggie she has accomplished very much, especially in the Y. W. C. A.
text: During her stay at Aggie she has accomplished very much, especially in the Y. W. C. A.

name: Eikleberry, Muriel
description: "Red" has made a good student in his prolonged stay here.
text: "Red" has made a good student in his prolonged stay here.

name: Roberts, Helen
description: Loved, respected and admired by all of her friends.
text: Loved, respected and admired by all of her friends.

name: Saxton, Oscar
description: A blond-top fighter from a good town. He's been a first rate student.
text: A blond-top fighter from a good town. He's been a first rate student.

name: Chance, James
description: James is our tall and stately man.
text: James is our tall and stately man.

name: Graham, Florence
motto: "She hears merry tales but smiles not."
text: "She hears merry tales but smiles not."

name: Lacey, Elmo
description: If you don't want to be shocked stay away from him. He is an electrician that will shock anything from modesty on up.
text: If you don't want to be shocked stay away from him. He is an electrician that will shock anything from modesty on up.

name: Agricola, Aline Kripke
description: Is another member of the class whose most peculiar characteristic is that she treats all men alike.
text: Is another member of the class whose most peculiar characteristic is that she treats all men alike.

name: Clark, Russell
description: He's quiet, thinks deeply and is energetic.
text: He's quiet, thinks deeply and is energetic.

name: Hicks, Jess
description: Although a new member of our class, he has shown himself worthy.
text: Although a new member of our class, he has shown himself worthy.

name: Hamilton, Ratha
motto: "Wise to resolve and patient to perform."
text: "Wise to resolve and patient to perform."

name: Bertha, McCutcheon
text: "Love is the wine of existence."

name: Carl, Ward
motto: "Nature gave him brains but denied him beauty."
text: "Nature gave him brains but denied him beauty."

name: Lois, Camp
motto: "If you want a thing done, ask someone else to do it."
text: "If you want a thing done, ask someone else to do it."

name: Vestel, Birkhead
motto: "The force of her own merits makes her way."
text: "The force of her own merits makes her way."

name: Carl, Roady
description: In every respect the future of this man is bright, for he is always willing to work at anything worth while.
text: In every respect the future of this man is bright, for he is always willing to work at anything worth while.

name: Agricola, Serena Wright
description: Serena has been a booster of our school since she entered here.
text: Serena has been a booster of our school since she entered here.

name: Verner, Hatchett
description: Three years ago from Scotland, there came to Arkansas Polytechnic College, a boy with the roundest, biggest and loudest mouth that ever burdened a human face.
text: Three years ago from Scotland, there came to Arkansas Polytechnic College, a boy with the roundest, biggest and loudest mouth that ever burdened a human face.

name: Mildred, Yates
text: "Winning disposition and a true friend."

name: Kenneth, Northwang
description: Ancient History will reveal his name on the first page; all his life he has doggedly worked for a diploma. This is Kenneth's last year of grace.
text: Ancient History will reveal his name on the first page; all his life he has doggedly worked for a diploma. This is Kenneth's last year of grace.

name: Davis, Vera
description: Although a Senior in high school she likes a Senior in college.
text: Although a Senior in high school she likes a Senior in college.

name: Stanford, Cecile
description: By her winning manners and lovely disposition she has won the hearts of all around her.
text: By her winning manners and lovely disposition she has won the hearts of all around her.

name: Jones, Clyde
description: His greatest ambition is to be a real golf player.
text: His greatest ambition is to be a real golf player.

name: Keathley, Boyd
description: Witty, honest, likeable. He has during his sojourn in our midst carved out for himself an enviable place in our hearts and the respect of faculty and students.
text: Witty, honest, likeable. He has during his sojourn in our midst carved out for himself an enviable place in our hearts and the respect of faculty and students.

name: Sullivan, Dorothy
description: Dot is loved and admired by all who know her.
text: Dot is loved and admired by all who know her.

name: Caviness, Troy
description: Although Pete hailed from afar he is well known within our ranks.
text: Although Pete hailed from afar he is well known within our ranks.

name: Wilkins, Lillie
description: Her most intimate associates are her books.
text:
Silence is Golden.
Her most intimate associates are her books.

name: Sands, Anthony Wayne
description: "Tad" is a remarkable character and has left an interesting record.
text: "Tad" is a remarkable character and has left an interesting record.

name: Joseph, Burton
description: Joe is steady, solid, business like and a real man from the ground up.
text: Joe is steady, solid, business like and a real man from the ground up.
